videos.headline: Timmy McClain lasers dart for a 65-yard UCF TD
videos.description: Timmy McClain's perfect throw finds Javon Baker for a UCF touchdown vs. Baylor.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Timmy McClain lasers dart for a 65-yard UCF TD) 2023/9/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Demari Henderson returns fumble for 87-yard UCF TD
videos.description: Demari Henderson takes the fumble 87 yards to the house to increase UCF's lead on Baylor.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Demari Henderson returns fumble for 87-yard UCF TD) 2023/9/30 ESHEET
